text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Attention! I hereby announce the<n>commencement
of the Tracen<n>Concentration Card Game
Tourney!<n>The grand prize is one coupon for a
special meat lover's course, brought<n>to you by
the cafeteria staff!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I shall claim victory—for Brian's sake<n>and mine!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is matching cards<n>masterfully in
a display of incredible<n>memory! Even Special
Week might be<n>outmatched!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...I can't give up! Meat... Meat...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Spe! After you win, we're gonna<n>throw a
meat fiesta to make up for<n>the meal you missed!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...! The match for this card is riiiiight...here!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Special Week has found yet<n>another pair in
just one try!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Lady Luck must really be on her side<n>to keep
matching up cards that<n>haven't even been
turned over once<n>yet.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...Or maybe she's just crazy focused<n>from
hunger.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're that trainer from the other<n>day. Sorry,
but spare me the small<n>talk.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I'm up against Spe next. And theround's about to start, so...

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And now we enter the long-awaited<n>finals! Give it
up for Special Week,<n>who's defeated formidable
opponents one after another to make<n>it here! Will
her final challenger meet<n>the same fate?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text: You got this, Spe! Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! M-my stomach...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you've used up quite a bit<n>of
brainpower. ...Care for a piece of<n>candy?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so the finals begin, if in a<n>somewhat less
than dramatic<n>fashion!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And they're at it! Special Week has<n>her eyes
closed! Is she going to use<n>that special power of
hers again?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Meat... Meat... Meat!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's this one! ...Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What a shocker! Special Week has<n>failed to
match the cards for the first<n>time today! What
happened to all that<n>momentum from earlier?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No way! Wh-where'd all my luck go?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
What? Not enough sugar to<n>concentrate? I have
more candy, if ya<n>want.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Groan... Thank you. Sigh...What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Special Week is unable to<n>get back in
the groove.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa emerges the victor<n>and
receives the grand prize.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! This is the coupon for the<n>special meat
lover's course... You're<n>really giving this to me?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You betcha. Just my way of sayin'<n>thanks for all
the fun. See ya 'rou—

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like we got an audience. I<n>can't say
peepin's a respectable<n>pastime.
choice_data_list: Was that a... bribe just now?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Huhhh?! Don't be ridiculous! As if I'd<n>ever
dream of cheating!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want the prize, so I threw her<n>a bone. All I
really wanted was to<n>throw a wrench in the
machine.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That's right. You're as stubborn as<n>they come,
aren't ya? ...Fine. Listen<n>up, 'cause I'm only
gonna explain<n>this once.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Do you remember that habit that Spe<n>has?
choice_data_list:
You mean closing her eyes before flipping the
cards?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Not only that, but then she'd<n>say things to
make herself even<n>hungrier.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You know, like, "Meat... I want to eat<n>meat..."
Yadda, yadda.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Now, I dunno if it was on purpose or<n>not, but El
mentioned Spe had missed<n>a meal. I bet she
hadn't eaten since<n>breakfast. She must've been
starvin'.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
As she got hungrier and hungrier, her<n>gut
instincts got sharper and sharper.<n>That's exactly
what led to her bout of<n>good luck.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
So I think to myself, what if we were<n>to take care
of that hunger? With, say,<n>I dunno... a piece of
candy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Things get a little out of whack. A cog<n>jams in
the machine. A hint of<n>distress starts to eat away
at those<n>gut instincts which have been<n>drawing
out such insane luck.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Relyin' on luck is for suckers.<n>Sometimes you
gotta use your<n>noggin.
